betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6UFO Coin§f quest involves §bexotic end-game content§f including UFO elements.

§eTasks Required:§f
• §b1x UFO Coin§f - Exotic currency
• §b1x Spawn UFO§f - UFO spawner item
• §b1x Nuclear Detonator§f - Explosive trigger

§eContext:§f This is an end-game quest unlocked after §bBalls-O-Tron§f and §bDineutronium§f. It involves HBM's more unusual late-game content.

§eObtaining UFO Items:§f
• Rare loot from structures
• Special crafting recipes
• End-game processing

§c§4WARNING:§f Nuclear Detonator can trigger explosives - handle with extreme care.

§aTip:§f This represents some of the mod's hidden end-game content.
